articles.title: Stripe rolls out stablecoin accounts in over 100 countries
articles.description: Stripe, a global payments platform, has introduced stablecoin-based accounts to clients in over 100 countries. According to a May 7 announcement, the new feature will allow the platform's clients "to send, receive, and hold US-dollar stablecoin account balances, similar to how a traditional fiat bank account works. "The product's technical page shows that the new account feature will support Circle's USDC (USDC) and Bridge's USDB (USDB) stablecoins. Stripe acquired the Bridge platform in October

articles.title: Careful when signing messages in Ethereum Pectra
articles.description: Security researchers flagged Ethereum's Pectra update for heightened risk of theft from malicious smart contracts.

articles.title: Bitcoin Rises as Fed Holds Rates Steady
articles.description: The central bank’s decision came as trade tensions between China and the U. S. appeared to de-escalate.

articles.title: Ethereum Price Holds Steady Following Pectra Upgrade
articles.description: ETH is currently stuck 40% lower than it was this time last year after devs finalized the Pectra upgrade.

articles.title: Ethereum completes Pectra upgrade, enabling ‘smart account’ wallet functionality and staking flexibility
articles.description: Ethereum has completed its long-awaited Pectra upgrade on the mainnet, its largest upgrade since the Merge and Dencun. The upgrade, which kicked in at epoch 364032, just after 6:00 a. m. ET on May 7, introduces a powerful suite of Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs) designed to advance staking efficiency, wallet usability, and layer 2 scalability, while laying critical groundwork for Ethereums long-term scaling roadmap

articles.title: Ethereum Pectra upgrade is live, bringing major changes to wallet functionality
articles.description: Ethereum has activated the Pectra upgrade on its mainnet, marking a significant milestone for the blockchain network. The upgrade went live at epoch 364032 on May 7 around 10:05 UTC. Tim Beiko, the Ethereum Foundation’s Protocol Support Lead, confirmed the upgrade, stating that Pectra had successfully gone live and finalized
